meta.title: Public RMS dynamic study on a public ANDES benchmark
meta.note: This is an RMS electromechanical benchmark screen using a public ANDES IEEE 14-bus dynamic case. It is not a converter EMT model. Scenario 2(M) is represented as four distributed AC-fed block interfaces, while Scenario 3(M) is represented as one centralized upstream front-end interface.

operating_source.burst_case_basis: MIT Supercloud p95 positive-event burst magnitudes
